title: frankenia laevis var. intermedia
intro: Frankenia laevis var. intermedia, also known as the coastal frankenia or desert saltbush, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the family Frankeniaceae. It is native to the coastal regions of Australia and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Aboriginal medicine. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as arthritis and digestive issues. Frankenia laevis var. intermedia is often prepared into teas, infusions, or salves for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
